clusters.justification: This domain captures the macro-level processing of emotional reactivity, autonomic arousal, and mood states that fundamentally co-activate across salience and limbic brain systems.
This domain encompasses the computation of incentive salience, reward processing, and motivated decision-making primarily mediated by mesocorticolimbic and striatal circuitries.

This overarching domain conceptualizes the generation of internal mental representations pertaining to both the self and others, mapping closely onto the macroscopic architecture of the default mode network.
